description: Identificador único da referência contextual de um patch
ID canônico do patch (CUR_XX | PET_XX | REC_XX)
Status de referência: CONTEXTUAL_EVIDENCE | AUDITABLE_REFERENCE_PROXY | STRONG_REFERENCE_CANDIDATE | OPERATIONAL_GROUND_TRUTH_BLOCKED | INSUFFICIENT_REFERENCE
Status de CRS: COMPATIBLE | INCOMPATIBLE | UNRESOLVED | UNKNOWN
Status de auditoria de coordenadas: AUDITED_COMPLETE | AUDITED_PARTIAL | UNAUDITED | UNRESOLVABLE
Status de linhagem do patch: GROUNDED_EXTERNAL | PLACEHOLDER | ORPHANED
Tipo de fonte: terrain | drainage | land_use | administrative | embedding_proxy | gis_index | other
Nome da fonte externa ou índice
Status local: EXISTS_COMPLETE | EXISTS_PARTIAL | MISSING | INDEXED_ONLY
Coerência hidrogeomorfológica: STRONG | MODERATE | WEAK | UNVERIFIED | BLOCKED
Coerência Sentinel-embedding: ALIGNED | DIVERGENT | UNVERIFIED | NOT_APPLICABLE
Status de alinhamento temporal: COMPATIBLE | INCOMPATIBLE | UNKNOWN | NO_EVENT_DATA
Status de revisão supervisora: NOT_REVIEWED | PENDING | REVIEWED_APPROVED | REVIEWED_REJECTED | PARTIAL_FEEDBACK
Se este patch pode ser elevado de status (true/false)

example: CRS reconciliation pending (B1); spatial overlap unverified; no event temporal data

description: Claim metodológico permitido (ex: contextual pattern indicator)
example: This patch exhibits strong topographic gradient per PE3D; context supports low-lying terrain classification; PE3D source limitation: partial stack coverage and no pixel-level validation

description: Claims categóricamente proibidos neste status (exemplos de lo que NÃO afirmar)
example: flood prediction | operational ground truth | detected suscetibilidade | training label | supervised class
Related to v1gq GIS index; awaiting CRS reconciliation (v1xx TBD); PE3D stack incomplete per v1gv coverage audit; no event correspondence in Sentinel archive
